filters.title: Filter the list to your budget
filters.body: Set 'Value max' to your balance to see only riders you can afford. The U25 / Free agent toggles open up cheaper paths.

list.title: Click a rider
list.body: The detail page shows full stats, contract status, and buy/auction options. You can start an auction or send an offer from there.

watchlist.title: Use the watchlist
watchlist.body: The star adds the rider to your watchlist so you can come back easily. The list also lives in the menu under Market: Watchlist.

emptyState.title: Build your first team
emptyState.intro: You have no riders yet. Use the filters below to find the riders that fit your strategy and budget.
emptyState.tipValue: Value filters = price ceiling in CZ$. Set max below your balance to see only affordable riders.
emptyState.tipStats: Stat filters = sport attributes (BJ, SP, TT...). Start broad and narrow down later.
emptyState.tipBudget: U25 / Free agent = budget-friendly paths: younger potential or riders without a contract.
